title: semrel plugin args: github
description: Publishes a GitHub Release and optionally attaches binary assets.

token.description: GitHub token with `repo` scope (or `SEMREL_PLUGIN_TOKEN` env var).

owner.description: Repository owner or organisation. Derived from the git remote when absent.

repo.description: Repository slug. Derived from the git remote when absent.

draft.description: Create the release as a draft.

prerelease.description: Mark the release as a pre-release.

assets.description: Comma-separated glob patterns for binary assets to upload (e.g. `dist/*.tar.gz`).
